---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool or enhancement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

A clear description of what problem this feature would solve.

Example: "I want to be able to ______ when running a campaign."

## Proposed Solution

A description of the feature or tool you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've tried.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request.
